text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, November 25. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Great consistency with running. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that soldering custom sensors in the garage. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Updating our financial spreadsheets. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Let's break this down. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I checked the recent logs for that. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. Great consistency with running. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Planning for future education costs. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That is a common bottleneck. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Busy day at Vertex Health. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
